comment:
WHITE FLORAL - HONEY - STONE FRUIT LIKE 

L - ACIDITY, L-M SWEETNESS, L BITTERNESS, WELL BALANCED.

HOWEVER - THE INTENSITY AND CLARITY IS QUITE LOW, BITTERNESS OF BLACK TEA APPEAR WHEN WARM AND COOL 

MOUTHFEEL IS SMOOTH AND SILKY WHEN HOT AND WARM BUT DRY WHEN COOL DOWN
disclaimer: This recipe is a starting point. If the brew runs too fast and tastes weak, grind finer. If it runs too slow and tastes harsh, grind coarser.

comment:
WHITE FLORAL - TROPICAL FRUIT - BLACK TEA - BROWN SUGAR

M AND PRONOUCE ACIDITY, L-M SWEETNESS, L-BITTERNESS, WELL BALANCED.

THE TRASITION FROM HOT - WARM - COOL IS REALLY SMOOTH. 
HOWEVER - THE INTENSITY AND CLARITY IS LOW, BITTERNESS OF BLACK TEA INCREASE WHEN WARM AND COOL. ACIDITY AND SWEETNESS IS STILL THERE BUT NOT ENOUGH TO SUPPORT BALANCE

MOUTHFEEL IS SMOOTH AND SILKY, DRY WHEN COOL BUT STILL PLEASANT
disclaimer: This recipe is a starting point. If the brew runs too fast and tastes weak, grind finer. If it runs too slow and tastes harsh, grind coarser.

comment:
FRUITY LIKE TROPICAL - PINEAPPLE OR PASSION FRUIT 

SILKY MOUTHFEEL AND LONG WINEY AFTERTASTE

MILD ACIDITY AND SWEETNESS, LESS HERBAL AND NUTTY OF CATIMOR

BUT COMPLEXITY AND CLARITY IS QUITE LOW

comment:
MANGO - TEA - MANGO CANDY

ML ACIDITY WHEN HOT BECOMING M ACID AS THE COFFFEE  COOLS TO WARM AND COOLS TEMPERATURES

WHEN HOT, WARM AND COLD THE SWEETNESS REMAINS AT A MEDIUM INTENSITY, LIKE MANGO CANDY

MOUTHFEEL IS SMOOTH AND SILKY WHEN HOT AND WARM BUT DRY WHEN COOL DOWN
disclaimer: This recipe is a starting point. If the brew runs too fast and tastes weak, grind finer. If it runs too slow and tastes harsh, grind coarser.
